decisions.decision: Use Masonry layout for budget groups
decisions.rationale: Prevents vertical gaps without drag-and-drop complexity
Income doesn't need spending targets; progress logic is inverted.
User wanted their tailored list (Housing, Food, Entertainment, etc) as the standard seed.

next_action: Verify if the budgeting module UI needs further enhancements, or proceed to the next phase.
context_notes: We just completed a series of user-requested UI fixes (uncategorized filtering, expanding ledger, removing income targets, masonry layout, custom scrollbars, and saving localstorage categories to defaults). No known bugs.
